headline: Assessing Charter Communications (CHTR) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Why Charter Communications Stock Is Getting Attention Now Charter Communications (CHTR) has caught investor attention after a recent stretch of positive returns, with the share price up over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. The recent 30 day share price return of 11.11% and 90 day share price return of 26.13% suggest momentum is building, although the 1 year total shareholder return decline of 27.90% shows longer term holders have...
